# Regex fixtures for skill: frontend-playwright
# Format: one directive per non-empty, non-comment line.
#   MATCH: <prompt>     — regex from config/default-triggers.json for this skill must match
#   NO_MATCH: <prompt>  — regex must NOT match
# Tested deterministically by tests/test-regex-fixtures.sh (zero LLM cost).
# Backend prompts that MUST NOT trigger the Playwright mandate (substring false-fires)
NO_MATCH: tabulate the metrics for the quant engine
# right-boundary guard: 'onboarding' must not match the 'onboard' token
NO_MATCH: update the onboarding docs
NO_MATCH: configure the skill registry
NO_MATCH: paginate the results from duckdb
NO_MATCH: transform the dataframe and reformat the output
NO_MATCH: perform the database migration
# Genuine frontend prompts that MUST still trigger
MATCH: fix the navbar layout
MATCH: the button component is misaligned
MATCH: make the dashboard responsive
MATCH: add a login page form
MATCH: a ui change to the sidebar
